subcodes.first_line: O thou who dost ascend unto the Kingdom of divine knowledge! This servant hath heard thy outcry, thy pleading cry, and thy yearning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المتعارج الی ملکوت العرفان قد سمع هذا العبد ضجیجک و صریخک و حنینک و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @composure; tranquillity; serenity, @courtesy; culture [adab], @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
